svg.title: MedLynq — Full Vision v3 (WhatsApp removed, v2 modules folded in, twelve new concepts added)
svg.desc: End-to-end vision for MedLynq Technologies. Mobile app MedLynq Go captures clinical evidence; AI assistant Lynq processes and intelligence-scores it; web dashboard MedLynq Pulse surfaces it to Nurse, Doctor, TPA clerk, CFO, Insurer-side viewer and Patient. Covers pre-authorization and claims workflows, FHIR/NHCX bridges, data flywheel and outcomes.
svg.text: One platform spanning capture · pre-auth · claims · query resolution · CFO intelligence · network insights. Built on the data flywheel only the first mover can have.

g.text: Dashboard: Pulse · Mobile: Go · AI: Lynq

svg.text: 1 · Capture lanes — three channels, one folder

g.text: Clinical capture standard. No gallery save. DPDP-safe.
Auto-pulls existing artefacts from hospital systems.
Real-time during OPD/IPD — prevents missing-doc queries at source.

svg.text: 2 · Two parallel workflows on the same folder

g.text: Before admission · request scheme approval · MedLynq drafts pre-auth packet
Auto-fills cost estimate + procedure codes · attaches consent + ID + referral
Same Lynq brain · doubles addressable workflow per claim · locks hospital in earlier
Status: requested · approved · enhanced · rejected (with reason)
After discharge · submission · query resolution · approval · payment
Already-on-file evidence reused from pre-auth — no double capture
Same submission rails (NHCX / portal) · same Pulse dashboard
Status: submitted · query · responded · approved · paid
Single source of truth · server-side dedupe
HPE · OT notes · post-op photos · discharge
Chemo cycles · drug barcodes · empanelment proof
Per-doc: type · MRN · procedure · date · page OCR
"Where is the HPE report?" → file path + pages
Powers Evidence Locator + NL Q&A search
Every artefact flows through this brain. Every output becomes training data.
Source: MedLynq Go · HIS · Pharmacy · Voice
Cuts ping-pong at the source · pre-attaches

svg.text: 5 · Lynq AI brain — prevent & resolve queries

g.text: Intelligence layer — prevention upstream, resolution downstream
in 78% of cases" — invisible to one
Every upload · AI step · HIS pull · query · response logged with actor + timestamp
Maps directly to FHIR AuditEvent for NHCX · powers compliance + legal exports
Visible per case on Pulse timeline · exportable to PDF/CSV
When insurer audits a claim — generate watermarked, time-boxed, read-only folder URL
No PII exposure beyond what's necessary · download disabled
Required for compliance sales motion · proves you have nothing to hide

svg.text: 6 · Bridges — the only middleware sitting between hospital, insurer and finance

g.text: PMJAY · CGHS · ESI · Railway · ECHS · SHA

svg.text: 8 · Query loop (5 steps) — when an insurer raises a query
9 · Pulse role surfaces — one folder, six lenses
+ Admin role: HIS / NHCX / pharmacy / ERP integrations · scheme mapping · DPDP audit · role & permission management · data-sharing agreement registry

g.text: Handwritten note → clerk re-types into 6 different portal UIs
"PROVIDE POST OP HPE REPORT" → 25–40 min hunting · 23 days lost · 3–8 rounds
CFO blind to ₹ locked · aging · underpayments · TAT vs peers
6 portals · zero APIs · every scheme has its own quirks
15–40% of hospital revenue locked at any moment
Pre-auth done manually on portal · patient waits · cashless surprises
Insurer re-asks docs already on file (no one can find them)
Empanelment lapses silently · claims rejected without warning
One folder · captured via Go (photo · handwriting · voice)
Risk scorer + missing-doc detection block queries before submit
When queries arrive: classify → locate evidence → draft → packet · 45 sec
NHCX FHIR submission · UTR auto-posted to Tally · full AuditEvent trail
CFO Pulse + daily mobile digest at 7am — ₹ unlocked, query trend, TAT
Lynq co-pilot prevents missing docs at the OPD/IPD bedside
Empanelment intel · auditor share · patient portal · ERP-synced

svg.text: 12 · Data flywheel — every query becomes training data

g.text: Better predictions feed back into Usage → moat compounds with every claim

svg.text: 13 · The numbers the CFO sees first

g.text: New from Blueprint v2 (Evidence Index · Locator · Packet Builder · Missing-doc detection · UTR · AuditEvent)

text.tspan: = twelve new concepts: A Voice notes · B Pre-auth · C Doctor co-pilot · D Consent ledger · E Empanelment intel · F Pharmacy/barcode ·

g.text: G Insurer-side mirror · H Patient portal · I Ask Lynq NL search · J ERP/Tally sync · K Auditor share link · L CFO mobile push
Bold-outlined boxes = new modules. Lynq orange = AI surfaces. Green = outcomes. Read top to bottom.
